bead.title: [visual-suite] V3 author DESIGN.md at repo root + add @google/design.md
bead.description: Per plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-visual-suite.md. Run 'bun add --dev @google/design.md@0.1.0' at repo root. Author /DESIGN.md capturing existing precedent (logo, current rgba triad rgba(72,120,198)/rgba(53,163,95)/rgba(142,53,163), terminal-demo tone). Tokens (colors, typography, spacing, components); prose Overview, Do's/Don'ts, metaphor system (lever/load/fulcrum). Lint via 'bunx @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md'. Foundation work, not throwaway spike — DDx has no visual language today; embedding is correct.
